Scope: both are unqualified store-level comp figures for the same industry (auto_parts) with no conflicting segment/ownership qualifier on either side. Mechanism: both report the identical 4.6 percent increase for the same period; Side B's "led by commercial" is merely color on what drove the same reported number, not a different causal quantity or position.
